reviews.review_msg: niall is amazing!! this prof was one of the most sweetest and most knowledgeable people ever! I found his lectures + readings chosen super interesting and insightful. Quizzes were a bit tricky (required very thorough readings) but essays, midterm, and projects were very straightforward. make sure to speak up during class for participation points
Very boring class. He will put you to sleep. I have had much more interesting english teachers in highschool. Quite a bit of reading.
Good prof! Need to study textbook along with lecture notes to get a good grade on final and midterm. Paper guidelines were easy to follow however, his lectures were not easy to follow.

Eng 115 Susan Brooks is a very good professor. Her lectures are very interesting and engaging. Course material was very good and I really enjoyed the required novels. Two weeks was given to each novel study and it was plenty of time. My TA was good at engaging the students in tutorial but her marking was extremely harsh.

Susan was a person who reiterated many of the ideas that were blatantly stated in the novel. Her lectures were very abstract and anything said in-class was not allowed to be used for your essays. She limits you on what you can write and the TAs were horrible. Essays were marked extremely hard with no real rubric! DO NOT TAKE THIS CLASS! GPA KILLER

She is definitely a great person, very understanding and kind. She is a little but "different" but hey, thats always a little bit fun. Despite being a good person her lectures are SO LONG & boring, many absolutely dread them

Honestly such a great prof. Very passionate about everything he talks about and gave us insightful knowledge about the material. If anything, he made us read 1 novel every 2 weeks, so there is ALOT of reading to get through by the end of the semester. I however was able to survive by skimming and using spark notes. Exams fair, just know the books.
